requirement_topic.en: EMC — Radiated and Conducted Emissions (SAME / AS/NZS Reference Standards)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC — 辐射及传导骚扰（SAME / AS/NZS参考标准）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC — 輻射及傳導騷擾（SAME / AS/NZS參考標準）

summary.en: Samoa Bureau of Standards (SAME), under the Samoa Accreditation Body framework, references AS/NZS standards for EMC requirements applicable to electrical and electronic equipment placed on the Samoan market. Radiated and conducted emission limits follow AS/NZS CISPR 32 (or equivalent CISPR 32) for multimedia equipment, and AS/NZS CISPR 22 for information technology equipment where still referenced. OCC type approval submissions for radio equipment are expected to include EMC test reports from AS/NZS accredited laboratories demonstrating conformance with applicable AS/NZS EMC standards. Chinese GB/T EMC standards and CNAS-accredited lab reports are not directly recognised in Samoa.
summary.zh: 萨摩亚标准局（SAME）在萨摩亚认可机构框架下，参照AS/NZS标准对进入萨摩亚市场的电气和电子设备提出EMC要求。辐射及传导骚扰限值适用于多媒体设备的AS/NZS CISPR 32（或等效CISPR 32），仍被参照的信息技术设备适用AS/NZS CISPR 22。向OCC提交的无线电设备型号认证申请，须包含AS/NZS认可实验室出具的符合适用AS/NZS EMC标准的测试报告。中国GB/T EMC标准及CNAS认可实验室出具的测试报告不被萨摩亚直接认可。
summary.zht: 薩摩亞標準局（SAME）在薩摩亞認可機構框架下，參照AS/NZS標準對進入薩摩亞市場的電氣和電子設備提出EMC要求。輻射及傳導騷擾限值適用於多媒體設備的AS/NZS CISPR 32（或等效CISPR 32），仍被參照的資訊技術設備適用AS/NZS CISPR 22。向OCC提交的無線電設備型號認證申請，須包含AS/NZS認可實驗室出具的符合適用AS/NZS EMC標準的測試報告。中國GB/T EMC標準及CNAS認可實驗室出具的測試報告不被薩摩亞直接認可。

standards_or_laws: AS/NZS CISPR 32 — EMC requirements for multimedia equipment (emissions)
AS/NZS CISPR 22 — EMC requirements for information technology equipment (emissions, legacy reference)
Samoa Bureau of Standards (SAME) — standards body referencing AS/NZS framework for electrical and electronic equipment
Communications Act 2016 (Samoa) — OCC authority over radio equipment conformity

summary.en: In China, EMC conformance for wireless and electronic devices is demonstrated against GB/T 9254 (equivalent to CISPR 22/32) for conducted and radiated emissions, and GB/T 17618 for immunity. Test reports are issued by CNAS-accredited (China National Accreditation Service for Conformity Assessment) laboratories and support the CCC certification and SRRC type approval processes. Chinese GB/T EMC standards and CNAS test reports are not recognised by SAME or OCC in Samoa.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线及电子设备的EMC合规须依据GB/T 9254（等效于CISPR 22/32）进行传导及辐射骚扰测试，以及GB/T 17618进行抗扰度测试。测试报告由CNAS（中国合格评定国家认可委员会）认可实验室出具，并支持CCC认证及SRRC型号认证流程。中国GB/T EMC标准及CNAS测试报告不被萨摩亚SAME或OCC认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線及電子設備的EMC合規須依據GB/T 9254（等效於CISPR 22/32）進行傳導及輻射騷擾測試，以及GB/T 17618進行抗擾度測試。測試報告由CNAS（中國合格評定國家認可委員會）認可實驗室出具，並支持CCC認證及SRRC型號認證流程。中國GB/T EMC標準及CNAS測試報告不被薩摩亞SAME或OCC認可。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 — Chinese EMC standard for information technology equipment (equivalent to CISPR 22/32)
GB/T 17618 — Chinese EMC immunity standard for information technology equipment
CNAS — China National Accreditation Service for Conformity Assessment (accredits EMC labs)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T EMC test reports from CNAS-accredited laboratories are not accepted by SAME or OCC. New EMC test reports issued by AS/NZS NATA-accredited (or equivalent Pacific-recognised) laboratories against AS/NZS CISPR 32 or CISPR 22 are required. If existing CE EMC test reports reference CISPR 32/22 directly (not the EN version), they may be submitted to OCC for reference, but acceptance is at OCC's discretion and is not guaranteed.
gap.zh: CNAS认可实验室出具的中国GB/T EMC测试报告不被SAME或OCC接受。须提供AS/NZS NATA认可（或等效太平洋地区认可）实验室依据AS/NZS CISPR 32或CISPR 22出具的新EMC测试报告。若现有CE EMC测试报告直接引用CISPR 32/22（而非EN版本），可作为参考材料提交OCC，但是否接受由OCC自行裁量，不予保证。
gap.zht: CNAS認可實驗室出具的中國GB/T EMC測試報告不被SAME或OCC接受。須提供AS/NZS NATA認可（或等效太平洋地區認可）實驗室依據AS/NZS CISPR 32或CISPR 22出具的新EMC測試報告。若現有CE EMC測試報告直接引用CISPR 32/22（而非EN版本），可作為參考材料提交OCC，但是否接受由OCC自行裁量，不予保證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC conformance to AS/NZS CISPR standards required for radio and electronic equipment placed on the Samoan market; AS/NZS accredited lab reports required for OCC type approval
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — EMC conformance to GB/T standards required for CCC certification and SRRC type approval in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T EMC test reports are not recognised in Samoa. New test reports from AS/NZS NATA-accredited laboratories against AS/NZS CISPR 32 (or CISPR 22 for legacy ITE) are required to support the OCC type approval application. CE EMC reports referencing CISPR 32/22 directly may be submitted for reference at OCC's discretion.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T EMC测试报告在萨摩亚不被认可。须提供AS/NZS NATA认可实验室依据AS/NZS CISPR 32（或旧版ITE适用的CISPR 22）出具的新测试报告，以支持OCC型号认证申请。直接引用CISPR 32/22的CE EMC报告可酌情作为参考材料提交OCC。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T EMC測試報告在薩摩亞不被認可。須提供AS/NZS NATA認可實驗室依據AS/NZS CISPR 32（或舊版ITE適用的CISPR 22）出具的新測試報告，以支持OCC型號認證申請。直接引用CISPR 32/22的CE EMC報告可酌情作為參考材料提交OCC。

requirement_topic.en: EMC — Immunity Requirements (SAME / AS/NZS Reference Standards)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC — 抗扰度要求（SAME / AS/NZS参考标准）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC — 抗擾度要求（SAME / AS/NZS參考標準）

summary.en: SAME references AS/NZS CISPR 35 for EMC immunity requirements applicable to multimedia equipment placed on the Samoan market. For telecom terminal equipment, OCC may reference applicable ITU-T or AS/NZS immunity standards as part of type approval technical file requirements. Immunity test reports should be issued by AS/NZS accredited or ILAC MRA-recognised laboratories.
summary.zh: SAME参照AS/NZS CISPR 35对进入萨摩亚市场的多媒体设备提出EMC抗扰度要求。对于电信终端设备，OCC可能在型号认证技术文件要求中参照适用的ITU-T或AS/NZS抗扰度标准。抗扰度测试报告须由AS/NZS认可或ILAC MRA认可实验室出具。
summary.zht: SAME參照AS/NZS CISPR 35對進入薩摩亞市場的多媒體設備提出EMC抗擾度要求。對於電信終端設備，OCC可能在型號認證技術文件要求中參照適用的ITU-T或AS/NZS抗擾度標準。抗擾度測試報告須由AS/NZS認可或ILAC MRA認可實驗室出具。

standards_or_laws: AS/NZS CISPR 35 — EMC immunity requirements for multimedia equipment
ITU-T K-series recommendations — immunity standards for telecom terminal equipment (may be referenced by OCC)
ILAC MRA — mutual recognition arrangement for accredited laboratory test reports

summary.en: In China, immunity testing for electronic equipment references GB/T 17618 and related standards under the CCC certification framework for ITE and telecom terminal equipment. CNAS-accredited laboratory test reports are used. These Chinese standards and lab accreditations are not recognised by SAME or OCC in Samoa.
summary.zh: 在中国，电子设备的抗扰度测试参照GB/T 17618及CCC认证框架下信息技术设备和电信终端设备的相关标准，并使用CNAS认可实验室出具的测试报告。上述中国标准及实验室认可不被萨摩亚SAME或OCC认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，電子設備的抗擾度測試參照GB/T 17618及CCC認證框架下資訊技術設備和電信終端設備的相關標準，並使用CNAS認可實驗室出具的測試報告。上述中國標準及實驗室認可不被薩摩亞SAME或OCC認可。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17618 — Chinese EMC immunity standard for information technology equipment
GB/T 9254.2 — Chinese EMC immunity standard for multimedia equipment (aligned with CISPR 35)
CNAS — China National Accreditation Service for Conformity Assessment (accredits immunity test labs)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T immunity test reports from CNAS-accredited laboratories are not accepted by SAME or OCC. Immunity test reports from AS/NZS accredited or ILAC MRA-recognised laboratories against AS/NZS CISPR 35 (multimedia) or applicable AS/NZS telecom immunity standards are required for OCC type approval submissions. CE immunity test reports referencing IEC CISPR 35 directly may be submitted for reference at OCC's discretion.
gap.zh: CNAS认可实验室出具的中国GB/T抗扰度测试报告不被SAME或OCC接受。须提供AS/NZS认可或ILAC MRA认可实验室依据AS/NZS CISPR 35（多媒体设备）或适用AS/NZS电信抗扰度标准出具的测试报告，以支持OCC型号认证申请。直接引用IEC CISPR 35的CE抗扰度测试报告可酌情作为参考材料提交OCC。
gap.zht: CNAS認可實驗室出具的中國GB/T抗擾度測試報告不被SAME或OCC接受。須提供AS/NZS認可或ILAC MRA認可實驗室依據AS/NZS CISPR 35（多媒體設備）或適用AS/NZS電信抗擾度標準出具的測試報告，以支持OCC型號認證申請。直接引用IEC CISPR 35的CE抗擾度測試報告可酌情作為參考材料提交OCC。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC immunity conformance to AS/NZS CISPR 35 or applicable telecom immunity standards required for equipment placed on the Samoan market; AS/NZS or ILAC MRA accredited lab reports required for OCC type approval
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — EMC immunity conformance to GB/T 17618 and related standards required for CCC certification in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T EMC immunity test reports are not recognised in Samoa. New immunity test reports from AS/NZS accredited or ILAC MRA-recognised laboratories against AS/NZS CISPR 35 or applicable OCC-referenced immunity standards are required to support the OCC type approval application.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T EMC抗扰度测试报告在萨摩亚不被认可。须提供AS/NZS认可或ILAC MRA认可实验室依据AS/NZS CISPR 35或OCC参照的适用抗扰度标准出具的新测试报告，以支持OCC型号认证申请。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T EMC抗擾度測試報告在薩摩亞不被認可。須提供AS/NZS認可或ILAC MRA認可實驗室依據AS/NZS CISPR 35或OCC參照的適用抗擾度標準出具的新測試報告，以支持OCC型號認證申請。
